name: Jumon Hailey
title: Friend & Ministry Partner
quote: I have known Tory since 2018, I met him at church while attending the Mid-Cities 191 Campus. From the moment that we met, I knew that he had the heart of the True Shepherd, Jesus Christ. Tory cares about people and is concerned about their lives. Some of the words that describe Tory are: patient, kind, respectful, and generous. Whenever you are in a face-to-face conversation with him, you will always feel like you are the most important person, because he will give you the attention that you deserve. Tory is considered a dear friend in my life, and I personally entrust him with the lives of my very own family. Allowing Tory to mentor/coach you or your company is one of the wisest decisions that you can make.
